title: Microsoft Modern Work & Security Solution Presales Speciālists

summary.lv: SoftwareOne Latvia meklē Microsoft Modern Work un Security risinājumu presales speciālistu/-i korporatīvo klientu apkalpošanai.
summary.en: SoftwareOne Latvia is looking for a Microsoft Modern Work & Security Presales Specialist to deliver value to enterprise clients through tailored Microsoft solutions.
